Career gun-violence-prevention advocate; previously Vernon Township Trustee.

name: Muller, Tiffany
resolved_employer: End Citizens United / Let America Vote — President (also President, ECU-LAV Action Fund)
evidence: Tiffany Muller is the long-serving President of End Citizens United, Let America Vote, and the ECU/LAV Action Fund, headquartered in Washington DC — exactly matching the donor's stated occupation 'President', employer 'End Citizens United', and DC zip. Formerly chief of staff to two members of Congress and Deputy Political Director at the DSCC; in 2004 became the first openly gay elected official in Kansas (Topeka City Council).

affiliations.org: End Citizens United / Let America Vote
affiliations.role: President
affiliations.snippet: Muller serves as President; the organization is a federal PAC/advocacy network focused on 'getting big money out of politics and protecting the right to vote,' has raised over $200 million since 2015 and helped elect more than 600 candidates.

affiliations.role: President (2024 compensation reported at $369,399 from related organizations plus $25,171 other)
affiliations.snippet: InfluenceWatch profile lists Muller as president of the End Citizens United Action Fund and reports her 2024 related-organization compensation.

affiliations.role: Deputy Political Director (former)
affiliations.snippet: Prior to End Citizens United she was Deputy Political Director at the DSCC and chief of staff to two members of Congress.

name: Sheftall, Bill
evidence: Public-records aggregators place at least two men named Bill/William Sheftall at the same 78747 household (2300 Innisbrook Dr, Austin): William L. Sheftall, b. 1953 (age ~72, consistent with the donor's 'RETIRED' occupation), and a younger Bill Sheftall (b. ~1985) who is a commercial real-estate broker associate at McAllister & Associates. The donor's 'RETIRED' occupation points to the elder, but the two cannot be reliably separated from public sources and no former career is documented for him, so no industry is assigned. A separate Texas Ethics Commission filing snippet shows a 'Bill Sheftall' of Austin 78747 giving $200 to Texas Sport PAC on 05/21/2025; the underlying filing was not independently verified and it is unclear which household member it refers to.

name: Revoyr, Nina
resolved_employer: Ballmer Group — Vice Chair and Executive Director, Los Angeles & National Public Safety
evidence: Nina Revoyr leads Ballmer Group's Los Angeles office and its national public-safety portfolio, matching the donor's occupation 'Philanthropy Administrator' and employer 'Ballmer Group'. Identity further corroborated by a prior FEC individual-contribution record listing 'Nina Revoyr, Ballmer Group/Philanthropy' in the South Bay LA area (90254), adjacent to the donor's Rancho Palos Verdes 90275. She is also a published novelist (six novels) and a former EVP/COO of Children's Institute, Inc.

name: Buchanan, Lillian

evidence: Lillian Buchanan, PhD is a Licensed Professional Counselor (NPI 1285238543) in solo private practice in Austin specializing in couples therapy, certified in both the Gottman Method and Emotionally Focused Therapy — consistent with the donor's occupation 'Therapist' and employer 'Self'. Her listed practice address is Travis Heights Blvd, 78704, one zip over from the donor's 78702 residential zip, so the match is strong but not zip-exact; no other Austin therapist by that name was found.

name: Robinson, Donald

'Donald Robinson' is a very common name and no public profile ties a Donald Robinson in Bellevue WA 98004 to Intra Management Solutions; LinkedIn/company searches returned only unrelated Donald/Don Robinsons and the firm's leadership (founder/president Matt Wojciechowski) does not include him. Industry assigned by the categorize-by-employer fallback only, from the self-reported occupation 'Consultant' at a management-consulting firm.

name: Flanagan, Margaret

evidence: Margaret 'Peggy' Flanagan is the 50th Lieutenant Governor of Minnesota (since Jan 2019) and resides in St. Louis Park, MN - an exact match to the filing's name, occupation ('Lieutenant Governor'), employer ('State of Minnesota') and city/zip (St Louis Park 55416). She is a member of the White Earth Band of Ojibwe and the DFL candidate for U.S. Senate in Minnesota in 2026.

The 'Self / Attorney' employer field on the filing reflects her law licensure rather than her Brady role.
